name: Band External Rotation at 90 Degrees Abduction
instructions: Attach a resistance band to a fixed point at shoulder height. Stand sideways to the anchor point and hold the band with the hand furthest from it.
Raise your arm out to the side to 90 degrees of abduction, then bend your elbow to 90 degrees so your forearm points forward, parallel to the ground.
Keeping your upper arm stationary and parallel to the floor, rotate your forearm upward until it points toward the ceiling.
Pause at the top, then slowly return to the starting position under control.
Complete all reps on one side before switching.
